title: Sapling extended spending key → payment address derivation
description: Given a SaplingExtendedSpendingKey for account 0, derive: (1) full viewing key (FVK), (2) incoming viewing key (IVK), (3) default payment address (diversifier index 0). Use the zcash_primitives spending key API. This is a prerequisite sub-step of nie-3ft (Unified Address). Use a subagent to read core/src/ and wallet/ to understand the current type hierarchy and integration points before writing any code. Defensive programming: all key material types must NOT implement Debug; derive() must return Err not panic on invalid diversifier (loop to find a valid one per ZIP-32 spec, bounded to 256 iterations max before returning Err).
acceptance_criteria: Unit test: derive default address from a known test spending key, compare against known-good address from zcash test vectors (external oracle). Test that invalid-diversifier loop terminates and returns Err, not an infinite loop.
close_reason: Implemented SaplingExtendedSpendingKey, SaplingDiversifiableFvk, default_address, find_address (bounded 256). Tests pass against ZIP-32 test vectors.
